children.heading: .—Exclusion of Battle and Interim Spares From Cost Limitation
children.label: b .—Exclusion of Battle and Interim Spares From Cost Limitation

children.text: Increases attributable to economic inflation after , not otherwise included in the amounts listed in subsection (a).December 1, 2018

children.heading: .—Written Notice and Briefing on Change in Amount
children.label: c .—Written Notice and Briefing on Change in Amount
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may adjust an amount listed in subsection (a) not fewer than 15 days after submitting written notice and providing a briefing to the congressional defense committees, each of which shall include the amount and rationale of any change and the resulting amount after such change.
